meaning: n.抱怨,牢骚,哀鸣vi.报怨声,哭诉,发牢骚,发呜呜声vt.哀诉
examples: Did you whine until they just wanted you to shut up?
This is not a time to lament and whine but to take thoughtful, positive actions.
You whine to anyone who wants to hear—and many who don't—about how crappy your job, life and boss is.
"Well, yesterday he was chiding me -- he said not to whine, " Huckabee said.
From the bankrupt peripheral nations of Europe people barely comprehend the whine of America these days.
